# Archived code

## Why this folder exists

Retired implementations kept for reference during migration. Never import into live app.

## What is here

- features/ — old planner variants
- data/planner-orphans-2026-06-14/ — unused data/planner prototypes
- docs/ — retired plan packs and recovered session logs
- legacy-tests/, imports/, css/

## Rules

- Do not delete without backup
- Do not import from archive/ in app or features
